title: Cerebro Catalog
description: Schema for cerebro-catalog.yaml — the Cerebro artifact registry format. Repo owners drop this file in their repository root to make their artifacts discoverable and installable via Cerebro.

name.description: Optional display name for this catalog or repository.

artifacts.description: List of installable artifacts in this catalog.

sets.description: Named collections of artifacts that can be installed together in one operation.

id.description: Unique identifier for this artifact within the catalog. Lowercase slug (a-z, 0-9, hyphens only; cannot start or end with a hyphen). Example: 'git-commit-assistant'.

name.description: Human-readable display name. Example: 'Git Commit Assistant'.

description.description: Short description shown in the Cerebro item list.

type.description: Artifact type classification. MVP-supported: 'skill', 'instruction'. All others are valid in the catalog but require a future Cerebro release to install.

source.description: Path to the artifact's root folder or file within the source repository. For skills: path to the folder containing SKILL.md. For instructions: path to the .instructions.md file. Must be a relative path; must not contain '..', begin with '/', begin with '\', or use a Windows drive prefix. Examples: 'skills/git-commit-assistant/' or 'instructions/python.instructions.md'.

supports.description: Tools this artifact is compatible with. If omitted, the artifact is assumed compatible with all supported targets. Cerebro will only install to a target present in both this list and the user's selected target.

tags.description: Optional metadata tags for filtering and discovery.

id.description: Unique identifier for this set. Lowercase slug.

name.description: Human-readable display name for this set.

description.description: Optional description of what this set includes and why.

artifacts.description: List of artifact IDs (from this catalog's 'artifacts' array) to include in this set.
